title: After the Hanshin J.F.: Child Prodigy

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I manage to win the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies!
Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It was difficult, but thanks to Trainer's guidance
and care during practice, races aren't as hard on
my body anymore.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
People even praise Trainer! ♪ Maybe it was
actually important that we met now, instead of
later...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case... I want to bring home another
big race victory for Trainer. Next up, I'm taking
on the Oka Sho on the Tiara tour!
